calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Mar-12-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Cristina Palomaria, Appellant/Defendant
Emelia Gerali, Respondent/Plaintiff
Jonas Singalang, Interpreter for Respondent/Plaintiff

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties and interpreter are sworn:

Emelia Gerali, Respondent/Plaintiff, testifies on her behalf. The following documentary evidence are introduced:
Exhibit 1 - Plaintiff's Claim & Order To Go To Small Claims Court
Exhibit 2 - Receipt from Best Buy
Exhibit 3 - Police Report
Exhibit 5 - Receipts from Best Buy Installment Payments

Cristina Palomaria, Appellant/Defendant testifies on her behalf. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibit C - Proof of payment to PG&E

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission.

Judge Ellen Chaitin, Clerk M. Olopernes-Pena, Not Reported (505).

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar Mar-01-2012 Set For Trial On Mar-01-12 At 09:45 A.M. In Dept 505

DEFENDANT'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jan-03-2012 Judgment Entered

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jan-03-2012 Judgment Entered

Off Calendar Nov-21-2011 Continued To Dec-12-11 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 506
